## Testing

- [ ] Tested on a real device (model: _______)

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded colours — all UI uses `settings.buttonColor` / `settings.buttonBorderColor`
- [ ] New strings added to all 8 language objects in `Translations.kt`
- [ ] No commented-out code left in
- [ ] Self-documenting names used — comments only for non-obvious *why*, not *what*
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` passes with no new errors or warnings
